name: Graham Cracker Honey Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush or grind 5 of the Graham crackers into a powder using a food processor.
2. Pour the graham cracker powder into a large bowl.
3. Add non-fat dry milk powder and mix well.
4. Add 1 cup of milk and beat until thickened.
5. Add eggs and honey (at room temperature) and thoroughly mix.
6. Add remaining 2 cups of milk and all the cream, mixing well.
7. Add vanilla last with a short additional mixing.
8. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for several hours (up to 24) before freezing in an ice cream maker.
9. In the last few minutes of churning and freezing, add the remaining 5 Graham crackers broken into small chunks by hand.
10. Yield: approximately 3 quarts.
